message:
feat(protocol): Add completion messages and expand elicitation types

Extends protocol implementation with additional MCP methods:

Completion Messages:
- completion/complete: Auto-complete prompts, resources, arguments
- CompletionParams with ref and argument structures
- CompletionResult with values and hasMore pagination

Elicitation Enhancements:
- URL mode with callback_path support
- Unknown mode variant for forward compatibility
- Refined type definitions for schema handling

Core Integration:
- Export elicitation types from fastmcp-core
- Client module updates for new message types
- Integration test scaffolding for completion flow

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
